# Generated by ContextEngine — npx @strifero/contextengine
# https://github.com/strifero/ContextEngine

# Project Context

## Stack
- React 18
- Vite
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- React Router v6
- Tailwind CSS

## Architecture
- `src/components/` — Reusable UI components
- `src/pages/` — Route-level page components
- `src/hooks/` — Custom React hooks
- `src/lib/` — Utilities and API clients
- `src/types/` — Shared TypeScript types

## Conventions

### Components
- Prefer functional components with hooks
- Co-locate styles, tests, and types with the component when possible
- Keep components focused — extract subcomponents when a file exceeds ~150 lines
- Use named exports for components (not default exports) for better refactoring

### State Management
- Local state with `useState` for component-level state
- `useContext` + `useReducer` for cross-component state
- Avoid prop drilling beyond 2 levels — lift state or use context

### Data Fetching
- Use `fetch` with async/await or a thin wrapper
- Handle loading, error, and success states explicitly
- Cancel stale requests with `AbortController` in useEffect cleanup

### TypeScript
- Strict mode enabled
- Type all API response shapes
- Use `satisfies` for component prop defaults

## What to avoid
- Do not use class components
- Do not use `any` — type properly or use `unknown`
- Do not put data fetching logic directly in JSX return statements
